title: Why India’s Decision to Pull Out of RCEP Has Both Pros and Cons

summary.about: The economic and strategic trade-offs in India’s decision not to join RCEP.
summary.audience: Indian trade officials, industry groups and foreign-policy analysts.
summary.method: A policy commentary drawing on GTAP estimates, trade balances and sector-level evidence.
summary.insights: Withdrawal avoids some import and sector risks, but sacrifices rule-making influence and gains that were modest economically yet strategically meaningful.
